{"steps": [{"title": "Garam Chai Banayein!", "image_show_confidencescore": 0.2, "image_description": null, "lang": "en-US", "frames": [{"frame_type": "concept", "text": "Aaj hum seekhenge garam **chai** banane ka aasan tarika! 
Tea banana bahut easy hai!", "highlight": ["chai"], "speech": "Hello students! Aaj hum ek bahut hi mazedaar cheez seekhne wale hain - garam chai banana!", "duration_ms": 3000, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": []}, {"frame_type": "concept", "text": "Pehla step: **Pani** ko **ubalein** (boil). 
Sabse pehle, pani boil karo.", "highlight": ["Pani", "ubalein"], "speech": "Sabse pehla aur zaroori kadam hai pani ko achhe se ubalna. Jaise hi pani mein bade bade bulbule aane lagein, samjh lo wo taiyaar hai!", "duration_ms": 3500, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": []}]}, {"title": "Swadisht Samagri Dalein", "image_show_confidencescore": 0.2, "image_description": null, "lang": "en-US", "frames": [{"frame_type": "concept", "text": "Ab dalein **chai patti** aur **cheeni**. 
Jab pani boil ho jaye, usme chai patti aur cheeni daalo.", "highlight": ["chai patti", "cheeni"], "speech": "Jab pani ubalne lage, tab usmein dalen humari pyari chai patti aur apni pasand ki cheeni. Ye chai ko uska rang aur meethas denge!", "duration_ms": 3500, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": []}, {"frame_type": "quiz_fill", "text": "Chai mein swaad laane ke liye hum ____ aur ____ milate hain.", "highlight": [], "speech": "Ab batao, chai mein swaad aur meethas laane ke liye hum kya kya milate hain?", "duration_ms": 3000, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "Chai mein swaad laane ke liye hum chai patti aur cheeni milate hain.", "quiz_keywords": ["chai patti", "cheeni", "swaad", "meethas"], "fill_blanks": [{"index": 0, "text": "chai patti"}, {"index": 1, "text": "cheeni"}], "quiz_correct_order": []}]}, {"title": "Doodh Milao, Pakao", "image_show_confidencescore": 0.2, "image_description": null, "lang": "en-US", "frames": [{"frame_type": "concept", "text": "Ab **doodh** milao aur ek ubaal aane do. 
Thodi der pakane ke baad, doodh milao.", "highlight": ["doodh"], "speech": "Ab jab chai patti aur cheeni thoda pak jaye, to usmein milaiye garam doodh. Doodh milane ke baad ek baar achhe se ubalne dein.", "duration_ms": 3500, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": []}, {"frame_type": "memory", "text": "Doodh wala ubaal, chai ka kamaal! 
Ek ubaal aane do, phir gas band kar do.", "highlight": ["Ek ubaal"], "speech": "Yaad rakho, doodh dalne ke baad bas ek ubaal aana chahiye. Zyada pakane se chai ka mazaa chala jaata hai!", "duration_ms": 3000, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": []}]}, {"title": "Chai Taiyaar!", "image_show_confidencescore": 0.0, "image_description": null, "lang": "en-US", "frames": [{"frame_type": "quiz_mcq", "text": "Garam garam chai banane ka pehla kadam kya hai?", "highlight": [], "speech": "Chaliye, ek chhota sa sawal! Garam garam chai banane ka sabse pehla kadam kya hota hai?", "duration_ms": 3000, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": ["Doodh ubalna", "Pani ubalna", "Cheeni milana", "Chai patti milana"], "quiz_correct_index": 1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": []}, {"frame_type": "summary", "text": "* Pani ko ubalein.
* Chai patti aur cheeni milayein.
* Doodh milakar ek ubaal dein.
* Garam chai ready!", "highlight": [], "speech": "To dekha aapne, kitni aasani se humne garam chai banana seekh liya! Pehle pani ubala, phir chai patti aur cheeni dali, aur sabse aakhir mein doodh milakar ek ubaal diya. Enjoy!", "duration_ms": 4000, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": []}]}]}
